---
title: "Lecture 28 Quiz: Session Tracking using HttpSession"
jupyter: julia-1.12
---

::: {.callout-note}
Review before quiz:
[Lectures](/lectures/index.qmd) | [Week 9 Content](/content/week-09.qmd) | [Lab 7](/labs/lab-07.qmd)
:::

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
using QuizQuestions
```

## Lecture 28 Self-Check

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. It always creates a new session", "B. It returns an existing session or creates one if missing", "C. It destroys the current session", "D. It reads session from database only"]
question = "Question 1: What is the behavior of `request.getSession()` in servlet code?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `request.getSession(false)`", "B. `request.getSession()`", "C. `request.createSession()`", "D. `response.getSession()`"]
question = "Question 2: Which call should you use when you want only an existing session and do not want to create a new one?"
answer = 1
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `session.setAttribute(\"user\", email)`", "B. `response.addCookie(\"user\", email)`", "C. `request.setParameter(\"user\", email)`", "D. `request.setHeader(\"user\", email)`"]
question = "Question 3: Which API stores user data in server-side session state?"
answer = 1
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. Session data is shared across all users by default", "B. Session data belongs to one client session and is isolated from others", "C. Session data is visible in URL", "D. Session data survives forever even after invalidation"]
question = "Question 4: Which statement about `HttpSession` scope is correct?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `session.close()`", "B. `session.remove()`", "C. `session.destroy()`", "D. `session.invalidate()`"]
question = "Question 5: Which method is used to terminate the current session and clear its attributes?"
answer = 4
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```
